docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSAL AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF INFORMS THE COURT THAT HE HAS BEEN UNABLE TO SERVE THE DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF FEDENCIO TORRES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TJOMAN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO THE ORDER SIGNED ON 12/03/21 BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY TORRES, FEDENCIO AS TO DEFENDANT BUDITASLIM, TJOMAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-03-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/3/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
